goal: pointwise_mul[T, R](u, f, t) = u(t) * f(t)
proof: function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[R, T](u, t, f)
function[T0: lib(zero).Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[R, T](t)
function[T0: lib(zero).Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[R, T](t)
let w0: T satisfy { f(w0) != pointwise_zero[T, R](w0) }
function[T0, T1: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { not is_pointwise_unit[T0, T1](x0) or pointwise_zero[T0, T1] != pointwise_mul[T0, T1](x0, x1) or T1.0 = x1(x2) }[T, R](u, f, w0)
function[T0: lib(zero).Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[R, T](w0)

goal: pointwise_mul[T, R](f, u, t) = f(t) * u(t)
proof: function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[R, T](f, t, u)
function[T0: lib(zero).Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[R, T](t)
function[T0: lib(zero).Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[R, T](t)
let w0: T satisfy { f(w0) != pointwise_zero[T, R](w0) }
function[T0, T1: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { not is_pointwise_unit[T0, T1](x0) or pointwise_zero[T0, T1] != pointwise_mul[T0, T1](x1, x0) or T1.0 = x1(x2) }[T, R](u, f, w0)
function[T0: lib(zero).Zero, T1](x0: T1) { T0.0 = pointwise_zero[T1, T0](x0) }[R, T](w0)

goal: pointwise_mul[T, R](u, f, t) = u(t) * f(t)
proof: function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[R, T](u, t, f)

goal: pointwise_mul[T, R](u, g, t) = u(t) * g(t)
proof: function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[R, T](u, t, g)
let w0: T satisfy { f(w0) != g(w0) }

function[T0, T1: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T0) { not is_pointwise_unit[T0, T1](x0) or pointwise_mul[T0, T1](x0, x1) != pointwise_mul[T0, T1](x0, x2) or x1(x3) = x2(x3) }[T, R](u, g, f, w0)

goal: pointwise_mul[T, R](f, u, t) = f(t) * u(t)
proof: function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[R, T](f, t, u)

goal: pointwise_mul[T, R](g, u, t) = g(t) * u(t)
proof: function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[R, T](g, t, u)
let w0: T satisfy { f(w0) != g(w0) }

function[T0, T1: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T0) { not is_pointwise_unit[T0, T1](x0) or pointwise_mul[T0, T1](x1, x0) != pointwise_mul[T0, T1](x2, x0) or x1(x3) = x2(x3) }[T, R](u, g, f, w0)
